name: CDU secondary loop ↔ TCS header hydraulic interface
description: One end-fed 2 MW CDU serves one 46 ft TCS row. The CDU provides flow and pressure; the TCS spends a small fraction of it and returns the heat.

parameters.source: ADC-MOD-TCS-001 §2; Deschutes §3.1 (CDU also DI water capable)

parameters.notes: TCS alarm 130 / design WP 150 / burst ≥450; TCS backup PSV preliminary 145 (RELIEF-01). TCS is designed above the CDU relief setting — consistent, but RELIEF-01 must produce the coordinated relief schedule.

parameters.value: no nickel-plated brass anywhere on the secondary loop; EPDM peroxide-cured only; NBR/silicone prohibited
CDU-as-flushing-rig approval pending (CDU-01); TCS target site flush ≤ 24 h
